full_text:
Gao Gan (Yuancai) 高幹 (元才)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gao Gan (高幹), styledYuancai (元才), was born in Chenliu. Nephew of Yuan Shao. Defeated Li Dian and Yue Jin at Huguan Pass. Gao Gan was affiliated with Yuan Shao. Gao Gan lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
